title: Weapons Purchased
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(Price), 0) AS spend FROM BuyWeapon WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Name_Localised, Name) AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM BuyWeapon WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Name ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} on-foot weapon purchase(s) totalling {spend} Cr during the report period. Your weapons purchases are the armoury receipts of your Odyssey career — the distribution shows where your combat priorities lie and which weapon types you keep returning to upgrade as your engineering and credits allow.
details.help: BuyWeapon Name_Localised is the weapon type. total drives the title as the purchase count.

tagLines: On-foot weapon purchase records compiled. Odyssey armoury acquisition log noted.
The weapons you keep buying are the ones you trust your life to. Usually that's a compliment.
Laser vs. plasma vs. kinetic. Your purchases reveal which side of that debate you landed on.
